zh.lifeSummary: Sara Colle於1575年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲阿爾騰吉陳書額斯坦福藍肯塔爾。她於1600年之前與Hans Pieter de Brier在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 福藍肯塔爾福藍肯塔爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1639年8月20日在德國賀瑟福藍福特 阿姆 麥福藍福特 阿姆 麥 (多)享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sara Colle于1575年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲阿爾騰吉陳書額斯坦福藍肯塔爾。她于1600年之前与Hans Pieter de Brier在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 福藍肯塔爾福藍肯塔爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1639年8月20日在德国賀瑟福藍福特 阿姆 麥福藍福特 阿姆 麥 (多)享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Colle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (northern), Walloon, and Flemish: from a short form of the personal name Nicolas (see Nicholas ). Compare Cole .

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: English (southwestern England and south Wales) and Dutch: from the personal name Nicholas (from Latin Nicolaus, from Greek Nikolaos, from nikān ‘to conquer’ + laos ‘people’). Forms with -ch- are due to hypercorrection (compare Anthony ). The name in various vernacular forms was popular among Christians throughout Europe in the Middle Ages, largely as a result of the fame of a 4th-century Lycian bishop, about whom a large number of legends grew up, and who was venerated in the Orthodox Church as well as the Catholic. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ), Greek Papanikolaou ‘(son of) Nicholas the priest’ and Nikolopoulos . Compare Nickolas .

History: The colonial official and revolutionary patriot Robert Carter Nicholas was from a prominent VA family on both sides. His father was a British navy surgeon who emigrated c. 1700 from Lancashire, England, to Williamsburg, VA.

variants.name: Colli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Gasper, Giovanni, Guido.
Italian: topographic name from the plural of colle ‘hill, col’ (see Colle ), or a habitational name from any of various places called Colli.

nameMeanings.name: Sara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

variants.name: Sarah
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

en.lifeSummary: Sara Colle was born in 1575, in Frankenthal, Schönstein, Altenkirchen, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. She married Hans Pieter de Brier before 1600, in Frankenthal, Frankenthal, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 20 August 1639, in Frankfurt am Main (Dom), Frankfurt, Hesse, Germany, at the age of 64.

ko.Frankfurt am Main, Frankfurt am Main, He: 독일 헤센 프랭k퍼트 아 맹 프랭k퍼트 아 맹 (돔)
ko.lifeSummary: Sara Colle(은)는 1575년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 알텐커천 슈o스타인 프랭켄솔에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1600년 이전 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 프랭켄솔 프랭켄솔에서 Hans Pieter de Brier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1639년 8월 20일 독일 헤센 프랭k퍼트 아 맹 프랭k퍼트 아 맹 (돔)에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sara Colle родилась в 1575 г. в местности фрэнкэнтэл, щoнстин, алтенкирчэн, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hans Pieter de Brier перед 1600 г. в местности фрэнкэнтэл, ландкрис фрэнкэнтэл, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 20 августа 1639 г. в местности фрэнкфурт ам меин (дом), Франкфурт-на-Майне, Гессен, Германия в возрасте 64 лет.
